message:
franken_numpy-fsr5 expose numpy.ma comparison + logical helpers

Extend fnp_python.ma with the comparison/logical helpers that were
still missing from the namespace. Same pattern as the kpaw creation
helpers (eager re-export from numpy.ma + PEP-562 __getattr__ lazy
fallback for embedded interpreters that finish module init before
numpy is importable):

- equal, not_equal, less, less_equal, greater, greater_equal
- logical_and, logical_or, logical_xor, logical_not
- all, any, allclose

The new identifier set is appended to both `ma_core_names` (eager
loop) and `_NUMPY_MA_CORE_NAMES` (lazy frozenset). Both paths return
the *same numpy.ma.<name> object* so identity / isinstance checks
pass when callers route through fnp_python.ma.

Add ma_comparison_helpers_match_numpy_oracles parity test:
- Identity check for every name (fnp_python.ma.X is numpy.ma.X).
- Element-wise binary comparisons exercise mask propagation
  (`mask=[F,T,F,F]` LHS vs `mask=[F,F,F,T]` RHS) and scalar broadcast.
- Logical ops walk through bool-array+mask combinations + the unary
  logical_not.
- all/any cover axis=0/1 and axis=None on a (2,2) masked array.
- allclose parity for both finite-match and finite-mismatch cases.
- Lazy-fallback verification: build a fresh module, delattr each
  comparison name, then re-getattr to prove the PEP-562 hook still
  resolves to numpy.ma's object.

rch lib suite: 471/471 pass on --test-threads=1. UBS exit 0.
